title: glandularia sulphurea
intro: Glandularia sulphurea, also known as Sulphur Verbena, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family, native to the southern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Glandularia sulphurea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Glandularia sulphurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
